beats: Visitors walk along designated pathway in clean room, staying away from machinery and yellow warning lines

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 进入车间后，请按指定路线参观。参观过程中，不得脱帽、摘口罩，不得随意触摸设备、物料、工装、产品和记录表单。未经允许，不得操作设备，不得进入黄线以内或设备防护区域。

prompt.positive: 16:9 cinematic wide shot, clean room interior with running machinery and yellow warning lines on floor, group of visitors in clean suits walking along designated path, bright industrial overhead lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style
prompt.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, missing safety equipment, dark lighting, cluttered background

_video_prompt.prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间内部. 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影. character (visitor_group): hair fully covered by cleanroom cap, white cleanroom suit, mask, cleanroom shoes or shoe covers, visitor badge + no exposed personal items. prop (running_equipment): state: active, visually consistent. prop (warning_signage): state: displayed, visually consistent. Visitors walk along designated pathway in clean room, staying away from machinery and yellow warning lines. Narration: "进入车间后，请按指定路线参观。参观过程中，不得脱帽、摘口罩，不得随意触摸设备、物料、工装、产品和记录表单。未经允许，不得操作设备，不得进入黄线以内或设备防护区域。". Camera motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up. 16:9 cinematic wide shot, clean room interior with running machinery and yellow warning lines on floor, group of visitors in clean suits walking along designated path, bright industrial overhead lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
_video_prompt.negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱线缆, 溢出液体, 敞开门, 无标识区域, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, missing safety equipment, dark lighting, cluttered background, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
_video_prompt.motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up
_video_prompt.tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
